items.title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
items.original_summary: The US government has issued an export control directive to suspend all access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5.
items.chinese_summary: 跟进报道：Anthropic 再次发布声明，确认美国政府出口管制指令要求暂停 Claude Fable 5 与 Mythos 5 的全部访问，已签发的 API key 同样失效。相对此前的差异在于本声明进一步明确「全部访问」范围，覆盖此前已签发的凭证。涉及工程系统需立即停用相关 model ID 并移除对 Fable 5/Mythos 5 的依赖。
items.backend_focus: 立即行动：把所有调用 claude-fable-5 / claude-mythos-5 的客户端切到 claude-sonnet-5 或 claude-opus-4.8，删除兜底逻辑中对该型号的引用；如已签发的 API key 被吊销，需轮换凭证并审计日志确认无残留调用。

items.title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consi
items.original_summary: Introducing Claude Sonnet 5 Sonnet 5 delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. Product  Introducing Claude Tag Claude Tag is a new way for teams to work with Claude. Policy  Policy on the AI Exponential AI is advancing at exponential speed, and the policymaking process was built for a slower world. We’re sharing policy proposals to prepare our institutions for AI progress. Announcements  Expanding Project Glasswing We’re extending Project Glasswing to a...
items.chinese_summary: Anthropic 升级旗舰模型 Claude Opus 4.8，在 coding、agentic 任务和专业工作负载上表现更强。相较 Opus 4.x，新版本在长链路 agent 流程与复杂专业任务上有提升，但具体 context window、max_tokens、tool use、prompt caching 字段需查 API 文档。属于主力模型的常规升级，建议做灰度评估。
items.backend_focus: 行动：在测试环境用 claude-opus-4.8 替换当前 opus 型号，关注 tool use、computer use、context window 上限、prompt cache（如 cache_control）是否变化；升级 anthropic-sdk 到最新 GA，模型路由处保留旧型号 alias 以便秒级回滚。
